mapper.select: SELECT b.member_id, b.member_name FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP_SUBORD A, CMS_MEMBER B WHERE A.member_group_idx = #{member_group_idx} AND A.member_id = B.member_id ORDER BY b.member_name

SELECT member_id, member_name FROM CMS_MEMBER A WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP_SUBORD B WHERE A.member_id = B.member_id AND B.member_group_idx = #{member_group_idx} ) AND (member_id like '%' || #{search_text} || '%' OR member_name like '%' || #{search_text} || '%') ORDER BY member_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WB_MEMBER_GROUP_SUBORD ( member_id, member_group_idx, add_dttm, add_id ) VALUES ( #{member_id}, #{member_group_idx}, SYSDATE, #{cud_id} )
mapper.select: SELECT A.member_group_idx FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP_SUBORD A WHERE member_id = #{member_id} GROUP BY A.member_group_idx
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP A, WB_MEMBER_GROUP_SUBORD B WHERE A.member_group_idx = B.member_group_idx AND B.member_id = #{member_id} AND A.admin_yn = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP A, WB_MEMBER_GROUP_SUBORD B WHERE A.member_group_idx = B.member_group_idx AND B.member_id = #{member_id} AND A.admin_group_yn = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP_AUTH A, WB_MEMBER_GROUP_SUBORD B WHERE A.member_group_idx = B.member_group_idx AND member_id = #{member_id} AND module_type = 'CMS'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WB_MEMBER_GROUP A, WB_MEMBER_GROUP_SUBORD B WHERE A.member_group_idx = B.member_group_idx AND B.member_id = #{member_id} AND A.member_group_idx = 7
